```go
import "github.com/agentstation/starmap/internal/server/params"
```

```go
func ParseModelFilterStrict(r *http.Request) (query.ModelFilter, error)
```

ParseModelFilterStrict parses and validates every supplied query parameter. Malformed client input is never silently replaced by a default or ignored.
